message:
refactor(runtime): update scheduler tests for WorkerCoordinator and add LocalSchedulerUnavailable error

The scheduler was refactored to use a centralized WorkerCoordinator
instead of per-waker Parker instances. This commit updates the
three_lane scheduler tests to reflect that change:

- Replace direct Parker construction with Arc<WorkerCoordinator> in
  waker tests (test_waker_* functions) so that TaskWaker fields match
  the new struct layout
- Access next_wake counter through scheduler.coordinator.next_wake
  instead of scheduler.next_wake in round-robin wake distribution tests

Also adds a new SpawnError::LocalSchedulerUnavailable variant to
src/runtime/state.rs for when spawn_local is called without an active
worker-local scheduler, providing a clear error path instead of
panicking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
